findings.issue: AH baseline used expected settlement score only and did not expose full distribution/fair odds for push and half outcomes.
Legacy quick-path value rows used model_probability/model_fair_odds fields that could be interpreted as 1/P(win) for AH push markets.
Stage10B dashboard projected value_rows but did not rank AH/OU/BTTS alongside 1X2.
Provider decimal odds and user-mentioned Hong Kong water were not represented as explicit odds formats in common domain code.
